name: Your Name
_comment: The builder picks a profile + lead competencies by detecting the role's sector from its title/fit-notes. Provide a 'default' plus any of 'fs' (finance/banking/insurance), 'ai' (AI/data/governance), 'public' (public sector). If you only want one CV style, just provide 'default' (or a legacy single 'profile' string).

profiles.default: One- or two-sentence summary, balanced across your strengths.
profiles.fs: Summary that leads with your financial-services / regulated experience.
profiles.ai: Summary that leads with your AI / data / governance experience.
profiles.public: Summary that leads with your public-sector / transformation experience.

rightToWork: Optional — e.g. 'Full right to work in Australia.' Omit to leave it off the CV.
